examples: Depending on your favorite science fiction story, teleportation is either a very, very bad idea or a very, very cool one.
"There used to be two ways of doing teleportation and both had their limitations," she said.
However, a new breakthrough in teleportation has just been made at Australian National University.
Valerie Jamieson is equally pessimistic about human teleportation moving anywhere beyond the realms of theory.
An international team of researchers has published their paper demonstrating quantum teleportation between two Canary Islands.
